name: HIGH WIRE NETWORKS, INC.
summary: Business Overview HWN, Inc., (d/b/a High Wire Network Solutions, Inc.) (HWN) was incorporated in Delaware on January 20, 2017. HWN is a global provider of managed cybersecurity, managed networks, and tech enabled professional services delivered exclusively through a channel sales model.
